name: zvideo_init_video_system
description: zVideo::InitVideoSystem gates reentry, binds renderer dispatch, opens and applies a video mode through the active backend, performs hardware texture defaults, and refreshes cached client coordinates.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?InitVideoSystem@zVideo@@YIHPAXHHH@Z at 0x4a75f0 still fails: 3 unmasked mismatches, 92 relocation bytes masked, 12 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 260 bytes, VC object symbol size 272 bytes.

Reviewed byte drift is limited to the final success epilogue after UpdateCachedClientRectScreenCoords: original zeroes eax before popping edi, while VC5SP3 pops edi before zeroing eax. The quad-batch specular loop has been source-shaped to match the original unrolled four-store pattern.

Functional coverage is dispatch/provider limited: the reentry guard is tested directly, and direct callees plus renderer dispatch state are tested with focused smokes. Full successful zVideo::InitVideoSystem execution reaches DirectDraw OpenVideoMode and host video providers, so deterministic success is deferred to the zVideo_dd backend/provider pass.
